type Principal struct {
	state         protoimpl.MessageState `protogen:"open.v1"`
	SubjectId     string                 `protobuf:"bytes,1,opt,name=subject_id,json=subjectId,proto3" json:"subject_id,omitempty"`
	SubjectType   string                 `protobuf:"bytes,2,opt,name=subject_type,json=subjectType,proto3" json:"subject_type,omitempty"`
	Provider      string                 `protobuf:"bytes,3,opt,name=provider,proto3" json:"provider,omitempty"`
	ExternalId    string                 `protobuf:"bytes,4,opt,name=external_id,json=externalId,proto3" json:"external_id,omitempty"`
	Issuer        string                 `protobuf:"bytes,5,opt,name=issuer,proto3" json:"issuer,omitempty"`
	Audience      []string               `protobuf:"bytes,6,rep,name=audience,proto3" json:"audience,omitempty"`
	TenantId      string                 `protobuf:"bytes,7,opt,name=tenant_id,json=tenantId,proto3" json:"tenant_id,omitempty"`
	OrgId         string                 `protobuf:"bytes,8,opt,name=org_id,json=orgId,proto3" json:"org_id,omitempty"`
	AppId         string                 `protobuf:"bytes,9,opt,name=app_id,json=appId,proto3" json:"app_id,omitempty"`
	ProjectId     string                 `protobuf:"bytes,10,opt,name=project_id,json=projectId,proto3" json:"project_id,omitempty"`
	Username      string                 `protobuf:"bytes,11,opt,name=username,proto3" json:"username,omitempty"`
	Name          string                 `protobuf:"bytes,12,opt,name=name,proto3" json:"name,omitempty"`
	Email         string                 `protobuf:"bytes,13,opt,name=email,proto3" json:"email,omitempty"`
	Phone         string                 `protobuf:"bytes,14,opt,name=phone,proto3" json:"phone,omitempty"`
	Roles         []string               `protobuf:"bytes,15,rep,name=roles,proto3" json:"roles,omitempty"`
	Groups        []string               `protobuf:"bytes,16,rep,name=groups,proto3" json:"groups,omitempty"`
	Scopes        []string               `protobuf:"bytes,17,rep,name=scopes,proto3" json:"scopes,omitempty"`
	AuthMethod    string                 `protobuf:"bytes,18,opt,name=auth_method,json=authMethod,proto3" json:"auth_method,omitempty"`
	IssuedAt      *timestamppb.Timestamp `protobuf:"bytes,19,opt,name=issued_at,json=issuedAt,proto3" json:"issued_at,omitempty"`
	ExpiresAt     *timestamppb.Timestamp `protobuf:"bytes,20,opt,name=expires_at,json=expiresAt,proto3" json:"expires_at,omitempty"`

	Roles         []string               `protobuf:"bytes,9,rep,name=roles,proto3" json:"roles,omitempty"`

var (
	file_iam_v1_iam_proto_rawDescOnce sync.Once
	file_iam_v1_iam_proto_rawDescData []byte
)

func file_iam_v1_iam_proto_rawDescGZIP() []byte {
	file_iam_v1_iam_proto_rawDescOnce.Do(func() {
		file_iam_v1_iam_proto_rawDescData = protoimpl.X.CompressGZIP(unsafe.Slice(unsafe.StringData(file_iam_v1_iam_proto_rawDesc), len(file_iam_v1_iam_proto_rawDesc)))
	})
	return file_iam_v1_iam_proto_rawDescData
}

func init() { file_iam_v1_iam_proto_init() }
func file_iam_v1_iam_proto_init() {
	if File_iam_v1_iam_proto != nil {
		return
	}
	type x struct{}
	out := protoimpl.TypeBuilder{
		File: protoimpl.DescBuilder{
			GoPackagePath: reflect.TypeOf(x{}).PkgPath(),
			RawDescriptor: unsafe.Slice(unsafe.StringData(file_iam_v1_iam_proto_rawDesc), len(file_iam_v1_iam_proto_rawDesc)),
			NumEnums:      0,
			NumMessages:   58,
			NumExtensions: 0,
			NumServices:   5,
		},
		GoTypes:           file_iam_v1_iam_proto_goTypes,
		DependencyIndexes: file_iam_v1_iam_proto_depIdxs,
		MessageInfos:      file_iam_v1_iam_proto_msgTypes,
	}.Build()
	File_iam_v1_iam_proto = out.File
	file_iam_v1_iam_proto_goTypes = nil
	file_iam_v1_iam_proto_depIdxs = nil
}

/*
Package v1 is a reverse proxy.

It translates gRPC into RESTful JSON APIs.
*/

	"errors"
	"io"
	"net/http"

	"google.golang.org/grpc/metadata"

)

	_ codes.Code
	_ io.Reader
	_ status.Status
	_ = errors.New
	_ = runtime.String
	_ = utilities.NewDoubleArray
	_ = metadata.Join
)

		protoReq VerifyTokenRequest
		metadata runtime.ServerMetadata
	)
	if err := marshaler.NewDecoder(req.Body).Decode(&protoReq); err != nil && !errors.Is(err, io.EOF) {
		return nil, metadata, status.Errorf(codes.InvalidArgument, "%v", err)

	}
	msg, err := client.VerifyToken(ctx, &protoReq, grpc.Header(&metadata.HeaderMD), grpc.Trailer(&metadata.TrailerMD))
	return msg, metadata, err
}

	)
	if err := marshaler.NewDecoder(req.Body).Decode(&protoReq); err != nil && !errors.Is(err, io.EOF) {
		return nil, metadata, status.Errorf(codes.InvalidArgument, "%v", err)
	}
	if req.Body != nil {
		_, _ = io.Copy(io.Discard, req.Body)
	}
	val, ok := pathParams["org_id"]
	if !ok {
		return nil, metadata, status.Errorf(codes.InvalidArgument, "missing parameter %s", "org_id")
	}
	protoReq.OrgId, err = runtime.String(val)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, metadata, status.Errorf(codes.InvalidArgument, "type mismatch, parameter: %s, error: %v", "org_id", err)
	}
	val, ok = pathParams["group_id"]
	if !ok {
		return nil, metadata, status.Errorf(codes.InvalidArgument, "missing parameter %s", "group_id")
	}
	protoReq.GroupId, err = runtime.String(val)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, metadata, status.Errorf(codes.InvalidArgument, "type mismatch, parameter: %s, error: %v", "group_id", err)
	}
	msg, err := client.UpdateGroup(ctx, &protoReq, grpc.Header(&metadata.HeaderMD), grpc.Trailer(&metadata.TrailerMD))
	return msg, metadata, err
}

	var (
		protoReq WriteRelationshipsRequest
		metadata runtime.ServerMetadata
	)
	if err := marshaler.NewDecoder(req.Body).Decode(&protoReq); err != nil && !errors.Is(err, io.EOF) {
		return nil, metadata, status.Errorf(codes.InvalidArgument, "%v", err)
	}
	if req.Body != nil {
		_, _ = io.Copy(io.Discard, req.Body)
	}
	msg, err := client.WriteRelationships(ctx, &protoReq, grpc.Header(&metadata.HeaderMD), grpc.Trailer(&metadata.TrailerMD))
	return msg, metadata, err
}

	var (
		protoReq WriteRelationshipsRequest
		metadata runtime.ServerMetadata
	)
	if err := marshaler.NewDecoder(req.Body).Decode(&protoReq); err != nil && !errors.Is(err, io.EOF) {
		return nil, metadata, status.Errorf(codes.InvalidArgument, "%v", err)
	}
	msg, err := server.WriteRelationships(ctx, &protoReq)
	return msg, metadata, err

		protoReq GetEffectivePermissionsRequest
		metadata runtime.ServerMetadata
	)

	}
	msg, err := client.GetEffectivePermissions(ctx, &protoReq, grpc.Header(&metadata.HeaderMD), grpc.Trailer(&metadata.TrailerMD))

// RegisterIAMAuthServiceHandlerServer registers the http handlers for service IAMAuthService to "mux".
// UnaryRPC     :call IAMAuthServiceServer directly.
// StreamingRPC :currently unsupported pending https://github.com/grpc/grpc-go/issues/906.
// Note that using this registration option will cause many gRPC library features to stop working. Consider using RegisterIAMAuthServiceHandlerFromEndpoint instead.
// GRPC interceptors will not work for this type of registration. To use interceptors, you must use the "runtime.WithMiddlewares" option in the "runtime.NewServeMux" call.
func RegisterIAMAuthServiceHandlerServer(ctx context.Context, mux *runtime.ServeMux, server IAMAuthServiceServer) error {
	mux.Handle(http.MethodPost, pattern_IAMAuthService_VerifyToken_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {
		ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(req.Context())
		defer cancel()
		var stream runtime.ServerTransportStream
		ctx = grpc.NewContextWithServerTransportStream(ctx, &stream)
		inboundMarshaler, outboundMarshaler := runtime.MarshalerForRequest(mux, req)
		annotatedContext, err := runtime.AnnotateIncomingContext(ctx, mux, req, "/iam.v1.IAMAuthService/VerifyToken", runtime.WithHTTPPathPattern("/v1/iam/auth/verify"))
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(ctx, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		resp, md, err := local_request_IAMAuthService_VerifyToken_0(annotatedContext, inboundMarshaler, server, req, pathParams)
		md.HeaderMD, md.TrailerMD = metadata.Join(md.HeaderMD, stream.Header()), metadata.Join(md.TrailerMD, stream.Trailer())
		annotatedContext = runtime.NewServerMetadataContext(annotatedContext, md)
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		forward_IAMAuthService_VerifyToken_0(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, resp, mux.GetForwardResponseOptions()...)
	})
	mux.Handle(http.MethodGet, pattern_IAMAuthService_GetMe_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {
		ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(req.Context())
		defer cancel()
		var stream runtime.ServerTransportStream
		ctx = grpc.NewContextWithServerTransportStream(ctx, &stream)
		inboundMarshaler, outboundMarshaler := runtime.MarshalerForRequest(mux, req)
		annotatedContext, err := runtime.AnnotateIncomingContext(ctx, mux, req, "/iam.v1.IAMAuthService/GetMe", runtime.WithHTTPPathPattern("/v1/iam/me"))
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(ctx, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		resp, md, err := local_request_IAMAuthService_GetMe_0(annotatedContext, inboundMarshaler, server, req, pathParams)
		md.HeaderMD, md.TrailerMD = metadata.Join(md.HeaderMD, stream.Header()), metadata.Join(md.TrailerMD, stream.Trailer())
		annotatedContext = runtime.NewServerMetadataContext(annotatedContext, md)
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		forward_IAMAuthService_GetMe_0(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, resp, mux.GetForwardResponseOptions()...)
	})

	return nil
}

// RegisterIAMDirectoryProjectionServiceHandlerServer registers the http handlers for service IAMDirectoryProjectionService to "mux".
// UnaryRPC     :call IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceServer directly.
// StreamingRPC :currently unsupported pending https://github.com/grpc/grpc-go/issues/906.
// Note that using this registration option will cause many gRPC library features to stop working. Consider using RegisterIAMDirectoryProjectionServiceHandlerFromEndpoint instead.
// GRPC interceptors will not work for this type of registration. To use interceptors, you must use the "runtime.WithMiddlewares" option in the "runtime.NewServeMux" call.
func RegisterIAMDirectoryProjectionServiceHandlerServer(ctx context.Context, mux *runtime.ServeMux, server IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceServer) error {
	mux.Handle(http.MethodPost, pattern_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_RetryDirectoryProjection_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {
		ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(req.Context())
		defer cancel()
		var stream runtime.ServerTransportStream
		ctx = grpc.NewContextWithServerTransportStream(ctx, &stream)
		inboundMarshaler, outboundMarshaler := runtime.MarshalerForRequest(mux, req)
		annotatedContext, err := runtime.AnnotateIncomingContext(ctx, mux, req, "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/RetryDirectoryProjection", runtime.WithHTTPPathPattern("/v1/iam/directory/projections:retry"))
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(ctx, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		resp, md, err := local_request_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_RetryDirectoryProjection_0(annotatedContext, inboundMarshaler, server, req, pathParams)
		md.HeaderMD, md.TrailerMD = metadata.Join(md.HeaderMD, stream.Header()), metadata.Join(md.TrailerMD, stream.Trailer())
		annotatedContext = runtime.NewServerMetadataContext(annotatedContext, md)
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		forward_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_RetryDirectoryProjection_0(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, resp, mux.GetForwardResponseOptions()...)
	})
	mux.Handle(http.MethodPost, pattern_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_ReconcileDirectoryProjection_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {
		ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(req.Context())
		defer cancel()
		var stream runtime.ServerTransportStream
		ctx = grpc.NewContextWithServerTransportStream(ctx, &stream)
		inboundMarshaler, outboundMarshaler := runtime.MarshalerForRequest(mux, req)
		annotatedContext, err := runtime.AnnotateIncomingContext(ctx, mux, req, "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/ReconcileDirectoryProjection", runtime.WithHTTPPathPattern("/v1/iam/directory/projections:reconcile"))
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(ctx, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		resp, md, err := local_request_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_ReconcileDirectoryProjection_0(annotatedContext, inboundMarshaler, server, req, pathParams)
		md.HeaderMD, md.TrailerMD = metadata.Join(md.HeaderMD, stream.Header()), metadata.Join(md.TrailerMD, stream.Trailer())
		annotatedContext = runtime.NewServerMetadataContext(annotatedContext, md)
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		forward_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_ReconcileDirectoryProjection_0(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, resp, mux.GetForwardResponseOptions()...)
	})
	mux.Handle(http.MethodPost, pattern_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_CheckDirectoryProjectionDrift_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {
		ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(req.Context())
		defer cancel()
		var stream runtime.ServerTransportStream
		ctx = grpc.NewContextWithServerTransportStream(ctx, &stream)
		inboundMarshaler, outboundMarshaler := runtime.MarshalerForRequest(mux, req)
		annotatedContext, err := runtime.AnnotateIncomingContext(ctx, mux, req, "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/CheckDirectoryProjectionDrift", runtime.WithHTTPPathPattern("/v1/iam/directory/projections:drift"))
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(ctx, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		resp, md, err := local_request_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_CheckDirectoryProjectionDrift_0(annotatedContext, inboundMarshaler, server, req, pathParams)
		md.HeaderMD, md.TrailerMD = metadata.Join(md.HeaderMD, stream.Header()), metadata.Join(md.TrailerMD, stream.Trailer())
		annotatedContext = runtime.NewServerMetadataContext(annotatedContext, md)
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		forward_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_CheckDirectoryProjectionDrift_0(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, resp, mux.GetForwardResponseOptions()...)
	})

	return nil
}

// RegisterIAMPermissionServiceHandlerServer registers the http handlers for service IAMPermissionService to "mux".
// UnaryRPC     :call IAMPermissionServiceServer directly.
// StreamingRPC :currently unsupported pending https://github.com/grpc/grpc-go/issues/906.
// Note that using this registration option will cause many gRPC library features to stop working. Consider using RegisterIAMPermissionServiceHandlerFromEndpoint instead.
// GRPC interceptors will not work for this type of registration. To use interceptors, you must use the "runtime.WithMiddlewares" option in the "runtime.NewServeMux" call.
func RegisterIAMPermissionServiceHandlerServer(ctx context.Context, mux *runtime.ServeMux, server IAMPermissionServiceServer) error {
	mux.Handle(http.MethodPost, pattern_IAMPermissionService_CheckPermission_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {
		ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(req.Context())
		defer cancel()
		var stream runtime.ServerTransportStream
		ctx = grpc.NewContextWithServerTransportStream(ctx, &stream)
		inboundMarshaler, outboundMarshaler := runtime.MarshalerForRequest(mux, req)
		annotatedContext, err := runtime.AnnotateIncomingContext(ctx, mux, req, "/iam.v1.IAMPermissionService/CheckPermission", runtime.WithHTTPPathPattern("/v1/iam/permissions/check"))
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(ctx, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		resp, md, err := local_request_IAMPermissionService_CheckPermission_0(annotatedContext, inboundMarshaler, server, req, pathParams)
		md.HeaderMD, md.TrailerMD = metadata.Join(md.HeaderMD, stream.Header()), metadata.Join(md.TrailerMD, stream.Trailer())
		annotatedContext = runtime.NewServerMetadataContext(annotatedContext, md)
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		forward_IAMPermissionService_CheckPermission_0(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, resp, mux.GetForwardResponseOptions()...)
	})
	mux.Handle(http.MethodPost, pattern_IAMPermissionService_WriteRelationship_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {
		ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(req.Context())
		defer cancel()
		var stream runtime.ServerTransportStream
		ctx = grpc.NewContextWithServerTransportStream(ctx, &stream)

			return
		}
		forward_IAMPermissionService_LookupResources_0(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, resp, mux.GetForwardResponseOptions()...)
	})
	mux.Handle(http.MethodPost, pattern_IAMPermissionService_LookupSubjects_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {
		ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(req.Context())
		defer cancel()
		var stream runtime.ServerTransportStream
		ctx = grpc.NewContextWithServerTransportStream(ctx, &stream)

			return

		resp, md, err := local_request_IAMPermissionService_LookupSubjects_0(annotatedContext, inboundMarshaler, server, req, pathParams)
		md.HeaderMD, md.TrailerMD = metadata.Join(md.HeaderMD, stream.Header()), metadata.Join(md.TrailerMD, stream.Trailer())
		annotatedContext = runtime.NewServerMetadataContext(annotatedContext, md)
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		forward_IAMPermissionService_LookupSubjects_0(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, resp, mux.GetForwardResponseOptions()...)
	})

	return nil
}

// RegisterIAMAuthorizationAdminServiceHandlerServer registers the http handlers for service IAMAuthorizationAdminService to "mux".
// UnaryRPC     :call IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceServer directly.
// StreamingRPC :currently unsupported pending https://github.com/grpc/grpc-go/issues/906.
// Note that using this registration option will cause many gRPC library features to stop working. Consider using RegisterIAMAuthorizationAdminServiceHandlerFromEndpoint instead.
// GRPC interceptors will not work for this type of registration. To use interceptors, you must use the "runtime.WithMiddlewares" option in the "runtime.NewServeMux" call.
func RegisterIAMAuthorizationAdminServiceHandlerServer(ctx context.Context, mux *runtime.ServeMux, server IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceServer) error {
	mux.Handle(http.MethodGet, pattern_IAMAuthorizationAdminService_GetAuthorizationSchema_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {
		ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(req.Context())
		defer cancel()
		var stream runtime.ServerTransportStream
		ctx = grpc.NewContextWithServerTransportStream(ctx, &stream)

			return

		md.HeaderMD, md.TrailerMD = metadata.Join(md.HeaderMD, stream.Header()), metadata.Join(md.TrailerMD, stream.Trailer())

	})
	mux.Handle(http.MethodPost, pattern_IAMAuthorizationAdminService_ValidateAuthorizationSchema_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {

	mux.Handle(http.MethodPost, pattern_IAMAuthorizationAdminService_DeleteRelationships_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {

	})
	mux.Handle(http.MethodPost, pattern_IAMAuthorizationAdminService_CheckAuthorization_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {
		ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(req.Context())
		defer cancel()
		var stream runtime.ServerTransportStream
		ctx = grpc.NewContextWithServerTransportStream(ctx, &stream)
		inboundMarshaler, outboundMarshaler := runtime.MarshalerForRequest(mux, req)
		annotatedContext, err := runtime.AnnotateIncomingContext(ctx, mux, req, "/iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/CheckAuthorization", runtime.WithHTTPPathPattern("/v1/iam/authz/permissions:check"))

		md.HeaderMD, md.TrailerMD = metadata.Join(md.HeaderMD, stream.Header()), metadata.Join(md.TrailerMD, stream.Trailer())
		annotatedContext = runtime.NewServerMetadataContext(annotatedContext, md)
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		forward_IAMAuthorizationAdminService_CheckAuthorization_0(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, resp, mux.GetForwardResponseOptions()...)
	})
	mux.Handle(http.MethodPost, pattern_IAMAuthorizationAdminService_ExplainAuthorization_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {
		ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(req.Context())
		defer cancel()
		var stream runtime.ServerTransportStream
		ctx = grpc.NewContextWithServerTransportStream(ctx, &stream)
		inboundMarshaler, outboundMarshaler := runtime.MarshalerForRequest(mux, req)

			runtime.HTTPError(ctx, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}

	})
	mux.Handle(http.MethodGet, pattern_IAMAuthorizationAdminService_GetEffectivePermissions_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {
		ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(req.Context())
		defer cancel()
		var stream runtime.ServerTransportStream
		ctx = grpc.NewContextWithServerTransportStream(ctx, &stream)
		inboundMarshaler, outboundMarshaler := runtime.MarshalerForRequest(mux, req)

			runtime.HTTPError(ctx, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		resp, md, err := local_request_IAMAuthorizationAdminService_GetEffectivePermissions_0(annotatedContext, inboundMarshaler, server, req, pathParams)
		md.HeaderMD, md.TrailerMD = metadata.Join(md.HeaderMD, stream.Header()), metadata.Join(md.TrailerMD, stream.Trailer())
		annotatedContext = runtime.NewServerMetadataContext(annotatedContext, md)
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		forward_IAMAuthorizationAdminService_GetEffectivePermissions_0(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, resp, mux.GetForwardResponseOptions()...)
	})

	return nil
}

// RegisterIAMAuthServiceHandlerFromEndpoint is same as RegisterIAMAuthServiceHandler but
// automatically dials to "endpoint" and closes the connection when "ctx" gets done.
func RegisterIAMAuthServiceHandlerFromEndpoint(ctx context.Context, mux *runtime.ServeMux, endpoint string, opts []grpc.DialOption) (err error) {
	conn, err := grpc.NewClient(endpoint, opts...)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer func() {
		if err != nil {
			if cerr := conn.Close(); cerr != nil {
				grpclog.Errorf("Failed to close conn to %s: %v", endpoint, cerr)
			}
			return
		}
		go func() {
			<-ctx.Done()
			if cerr := conn.Close(); cerr != nil {
				grpclog.Errorf("Failed to close conn to %s: %v", endpoint, cerr)
			}
		}()
	}()
	return RegisterIAMAuthServiceHandler(ctx, mux, conn)
}

// RegisterIAMAuthServiceHandler registers the http handlers for service IAMAuthService to "mux".
// The handlers forward requests to the grpc endpoint over "conn".
func RegisterIAMAuthServiceHandler(ctx context.Context, mux *runtime.ServeMux, conn *grpc.ClientConn) error {
	return RegisterIAMAuthServiceHandlerClient(ctx, mux, NewIAMAuthServiceClient(conn))
}

// RegisterIAMAuthServiceHandlerClient registers the http handlers for service IAMAuthService
// to "mux". The handlers forward requests to the grpc endpoint over the given implementation of "IAMAuthServiceClient".
// Note: the gRPC framework executes interceptors within the gRPC handler. If the passed in "IAMAuthServiceClient"
// doesn't go through the normal gRPC flow (creating a gRPC client etc.) then it will be up to the passed in
// "IAMAuthServiceClient" to call the correct interceptors. This client ignores the HTTP middlewares.
func RegisterIAMAuthServiceHandlerClient(ctx context.Context, mux *runtime.ServeMux, client IAMAuthServiceClient) error {
	mux.Handle(http.MethodPost, pattern_IAMAuthService_VerifyToken_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {
		ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(req.Context())
		defer cancel()
		inboundMarshaler, outboundMarshaler := runtime.MarshalerForRequest(mux, req)
		annotatedContext, err := runtime.AnnotateContext(ctx, mux, req, "/iam.v1.IAMAuthService/VerifyToken", runtime.WithHTTPPathPattern("/v1/iam/auth/verify"))
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(ctx, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		resp, md, err := request_IAMAuthService_VerifyToken_0(annotatedContext, inboundMarshaler, client, req, pathParams)
		annotatedContext = runtime.NewServerMetadataContext(annotatedContext, md)
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		forward_IAMAuthService_VerifyToken_0(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, resp, mux.GetForwardResponseOptions()...)
	})
	mux.Handle(http.MethodGet, pattern_IAMAuthService_GetMe_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {
		ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(req.Context())
		defer cancel()
		inboundMarshaler, outboundMarshaler := runtime.MarshalerForRequest(mux, req)
		annotatedContext, err := runtime.AnnotateContext(ctx, mux, req, "/iam.v1.IAMAuthService/GetMe", runtime.WithHTTPPathPattern("/v1/iam/me"))
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(ctx, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		resp, md, err := request_IAMAuthService_GetMe_0(annotatedContext, inboundMarshaler, client, req, pathParams)
		annotatedContext = runtime.NewServerMetadataContext(annotatedContext, md)
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		forward_IAMAuthService_GetMe_0(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, resp, mux.GetForwardResponseOptions()...)
	})
	return nil
}

var (
	pattern_IAMAuthService_VerifyToken_0 = runtime.MustPattern(runtime.NewPattern(1, []int{2, 0, 2, 1, 2, 2, 2, 3}, []string{"v1", "iam", "auth", "verify"}, ""))
	pattern_IAMAuthService_GetMe_0       = runtime.MustPattern(runtime.NewPattern(1, []int{2, 0, 2, 1, 2, 2}, []string{"v1", "iam", "me"}, ""))
)

var (
	forward_IAMAuthService_VerifyToken_0 = runtime.ForwardResponseMessage
	forward_IAMAuthService_GetMe_0       = runtime.ForwardResponseMessage
)

// RegisterIAMDirectoryServiceHandlerFromEndpoint is same as RegisterIAMDirectoryServiceHandler but
// automatically dials to "endpoint" and closes the connection when "ctx" gets done.
func RegisterIAMDirectoryServiceHandlerFromEndpoint(ctx context.Context, mux *runtime.ServeMux, endpoint string, opts []grpc.DialOption) (err error) {
	conn, err := grpc.NewClient(endpoint, opts...)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer func() {
		if err != nil {
			if cerr := conn.Close(); cerr != nil {
				grpclog.Errorf("Failed to close conn to %s: %v", endpoint, cerr)
			}
			return
		}
		go func() {
			<-ctx.Done()
			if cerr := conn.Close(); cerr != nil {
				grpclog.Errorf("Failed to close conn to %s: %v", endpoint, cerr)
			}
		}()
	}()
	return RegisterIAMDirectoryServiceHandler(ctx, mux, conn)
}

// RegisterIAMDirectoryServiceHandler registers the http handlers for service IAMDirectoryService to "mux".
// The handlers forward requests to the grpc endpoint over "conn".
func RegisterIAMDirectoryServiceHandler(ctx context.Context, mux *runtime.ServeMux, conn *grpc.ClientConn) error {
	return RegisterIAMDirectoryServiceHandlerClient(ctx, mux, NewIAMDirectoryServiceClient(conn))
}

// RegisterIAMDirectoryProjectionServiceHandlerFromEndpoint is same as RegisterIAMDirectoryProjectionServiceHandler but
// automatically dials to "endpoint" and closes the connection when "ctx" gets done.
func RegisterIAMDirectoryProjectionServiceHandlerFromEndpoint(ctx context.Context, mux *runtime.ServeMux, endpoint string, opts []grpc.DialOption) (err error) {
	conn, err := grpc.NewClient(endpoint, opts...)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer func() {
		if err != nil {
			if cerr := conn.Close(); cerr != nil {
				grpclog.Errorf("Failed to close conn to %s: %v", endpoint, cerr)
			}
			return
		}
		go func() {
			<-ctx.Done()
			if cerr := conn.Close(); cerr != nil {
				grpclog.Errorf("Failed to close conn to %s: %v", endpoint, cerr)
			}
		}()
	}()
	return RegisterIAMDirectoryProjectionServiceHandler(ctx, mux, conn)
}

// RegisterIAMDirectoryProjectionServiceHandler registers the http handlers for service IAMDirectoryProjectionService to "mux".
// The handlers forward requests to the grpc endpoint over "conn".
func RegisterIAMDirectoryProjectionServiceHandler(ctx context.Context, mux *runtime.ServeMux, conn *grpc.ClientConn) error {
	return RegisterIAMDirectoryProjectionServiceHandlerClient(ctx, mux, NewIAMDirectoryProjectionServiceClient(conn))
}

// RegisterIAMDirectoryProjectionServiceHandlerClient registers the http handlers for service IAMDirectoryProjectionService
// to "mux". The handlers forward requests to the grpc endpoint over the given implementation of "IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceClient".
// Note: the gRPC framework executes interceptors within the gRPC handler. If the passed in "IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceClient"
// doesn't go through the normal gRPC flow (creating a gRPC client etc.) then it will be up to the passed in
// "IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceClient" to call the correct interceptors. This client ignores the HTTP middlewares.
func RegisterIAMDirectoryProjectionServiceHandlerClient(ctx context.Context, mux *runtime.ServeMux, client IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceClient) error {
	mux.Handle(http.MethodPost, pattern_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_RetryDirectoryProjection_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {
		ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(req.Context())
		defer cancel()
		inboundMarshaler, outboundMarshaler := runtime.MarshalerForRequest(mux, req)
		annotatedContext, err := runtime.AnnotateContext(ctx, mux, req, "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/RetryDirectoryProjection", runtime.WithHTTPPathPattern("/v1/iam/directory/projections:retry"))
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(ctx, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		resp, md, err := request_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_RetryDirectoryProjection_0(annotatedContext, inboundMarshaler, client, req, pathParams)
		annotatedContext = runtime.NewServerMetadataContext(annotatedContext, md)
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		forward_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_RetryDirectoryProjection_0(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, resp, mux.GetForwardResponseOptions()...)
	})
	mux.Handle(http.MethodPost, pattern_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_ReconcileDirectoryProjection_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {
		ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(req.Context())
		defer cancel()
		inboundMarshaler, outboundMarshaler := runtime.MarshalerForRequest(mux, req)
		annotatedContext, err := runtime.AnnotateContext(ctx, mux, req, "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/ReconcileDirectoryProjection", runtime.WithHTTPPathPattern("/v1/iam/directory/projections:reconcile"))
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(ctx, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		resp, md, err := request_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_ReconcileDirectoryProjection_0(annotatedContext, inboundMarshaler, client, req, pathParams)
		annotatedContext = runtime.NewServerMetadataContext(annotatedContext, md)
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		forward_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_ReconcileDirectoryProjection_0(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, resp, mux.GetForwardResponseOptions()...)
	})
	mux.Handle(http.MethodPost, pattern_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_CheckDirectoryProjectionDrift_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {
		ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(req.Context())
		defer cancel()
		inboundMarshaler, outboundMarshaler := runtime.MarshalerForRequest(mux, req)
		annotatedContext, err := runtime.AnnotateContext(ctx, mux, req, "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/CheckDirectoryProjectionDrift", runtime.WithHTTPPathPattern("/v1/iam/directory/projections:drift"))
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(ctx, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		resp, md, err := request_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_CheckDirectoryProjectionDrift_0(annotatedContext, inboundMarshaler, client, req, pathParams)
		annotatedContext = runtime.NewServerMetadataContext(annotatedContext, md)
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		forward_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_CheckDirectoryProjectionDrift_0(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, resp, mux.GetForwardResponseOptions()...)
	})
	return nil
}

var (
	pattern_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_RetryDirectoryProjection_0      = runtime.MustPattern(runtime.NewPattern(1, []int{2, 0, 2, 1, 2, 2, 2, 3}, []string{"v1", "iam", "directory", "projections"}, "retry"))
	pattern_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_ReconcileDirectoryProjection_0  = runtime.MustPattern(runtime.NewPattern(1, []int{2, 0, 2, 1, 2, 2, 2, 3}, []string{"v1", "iam", "directory", "projections"}, "reconcile"))
	pattern_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_CheckDirectoryProjectionDrift_0 = runtime.MustPattern(runtime.NewPattern(1, []int{2, 0, 2, 1, 2, 2, 2, 3}, []string{"v1", "iam", "directory", "projections"}, "drift"))
)

var (
	forward_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_RetryDirectoryProjection_0      = runtime.ForwardResponseMessage
	forward_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_ReconcileDirectoryProjection_0  = runtime.ForwardResponseMessage
	forward_IAMDirectoryProjectionService_CheckDirectoryProjectionDrift_0 = runtime.ForwardResponseMessage
)

// RegisterIAMPermissionServiceHandlerFromEndpoint is same as RegisterIAMPermissionServiceHandler but
// automatically dials to "endpoint" and closes the connection when "ctx" gets done.
func RegisterIAMPermissionServiceHandlerFromEndpoint(ctx context.Context, mux *runtime.ServeMux, endpoint string, opts []grpc.DialOption) (err error) {
	conn, err := grpc.NewClient(endpoint, opts...)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer func() {
		if err != nil {
			if cerr := conn.Close(); cerr != nil {
				grpclog.Errorf("Failed to close conn to %s: %v", endpoint, cerr)
			}
			return
		}
		go func() {
			<-ctx.Done()
			if cerr := conn.Close(); cerr != nil {
				grpclog.Errorf("Failed to close conn to %s: %v", endpoint, cerr)
			}
		}()
	}()
	return RegisterIAMPermissionServiceHandler(ctx, mux, conn)
}

// RegisterIAMPermissionServiceHandler registers the http handlers for service IAMPermissionService to "mux".
// The handlers forward requests to the grpc endpoint over "conn".
func RegisterIAMPermissionServiceHandler(ctx context.Context, mux *runtime.ServeMux, conn *grpc.ClientConn) error {
	return RegisterIAMPermissionServiceHandlerClient(ctx, mux, NewIAMPermissionServiceClient(conn))
}

// RegisterIAMPermissionServiceHandlerClient registers the http handlers for service IAMPermissionService
// to "mux". The handlers forward requests to the grpc endpoint over the given implementation of "IAMPermissionServiceClient".
// Note: the gRPC framework executes interceptors within the gRPC handler. If the passed in "IAMPermissionServiceClient"
// doesn't go through the normal gRPC flow (creating a gRPC client etc.) then it will be up to the passed in
// "IAMPermissionServiceClient" to call the correct interceptors. This client ignores the HTTP middlewares.
func RegisterIAMPermissionServiceHandlerClient(ctx context.Context, mux *runtime.ServeMux, client IAMPermissionServiceClient) error {
	mux.Handle(http.MethodPost, pattern_IAMPermissionService_CheckPermission_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {

			runtime.HTTPError(ctx, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		resp, md, err := request_IAMPermissionService_CheckPermission_0(annotatedContext, inboundMarshaler, client, req, pathParams)
		annotatedContext = runtime.NewServerMetadataContext(annotatedContext, md)
		if err != nil {
			runtime.HTTPError(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, err)
			return
		}
		forward_IAMPermissionService_CheckPermission_0(annotatedContext, mux, outboundMarshaler, w, req, resp, mux.GetForwardResponseOptions()...)
	})
	mux.Handle(http.MethodPost, pattern_IAMPermissionService_WriteRelationship_0, func(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, pathParams map[string]string) {

	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer func() {
		if err != nil {
			if cerr := conn.Close(); cerr != nil {
				grpclog.Errorf("Failed to close conn to %s: %v", endpoint, cerr)
			}
			return
		}
		go func() {
			<-ctx.Done()
			if cerr := conn.Close(); cerr != nil {
				grpclog.Errorf("Failed to close conn to %s: %v", endpoint, cerr)
			}
		}()
	}()
	return RegisterIAMAuthorizationAdminServiceHandler(ctx, mux, conn)
}

===== api/iam/v1/iam.proto =====
syntax = "proto3";

package iam.v1;

import "aisphere/access/v1/access.proto";
import "buf/validate/validate.proto";
import "google/api/annotations.proto";
import "google/api/field_behavior.proto";
import "google/protobuf/empty.proto";
import "google/protobuf/timestamp.proto";

option go_package = "github.com/aisphereio/aisphere-iam/api/iam/v1;v1";

service IAMAuthService {
  rpc VerifyToken(VerifyTokenRequest) returns (Principal) {
    option (google.api.http) = { post: "/v1/iam/auth/verify" body: "*" };
    option (aisphere.access.v1.policy) = {
      exposure: INTERNAL
      authz: { action: "verify" resource: "iam:token" audience: "iam-service" mode: CHECK_ONLY }
      audit: { enabled: true event: "iam.verify_token" risk: "medium" }
      reason: "Token verification is only callable by trusted platform services."
    };
  }

  rpc GetMe(GetMeRequest) returns (GetMeReply) {
    option (google.api.http) = { get: "/v1/iam/me" };
    option (aisphere.access.v1.policy) = {
      exposure: AUTHENTICATED
      authz: { action: "read" resource: "iam:self" audience: "iam-service" mode: SELF_CHECK }
      audit: { enabled: true event: "iam.get_me" risk: "low" }
    };
  }
}

message Principal { string subject_id = 1; string subject_type = 2; string provider = 3; string external_id = 4; string issuer = 5; repeated string audience = 6; string tenant_id = 7; string org_id = 8; string app_id = 9; string project_id = 10; string username = 11; string name = 12; string email = 13; string phone = 14; repeated string roles = 15; repeated string groups = 16; repeated string scopes = 17; string auth_method = 18; google.protobuf.Timestamp issued_at = 19; google.protobuf.Timestamp expires_at = 20; }

message Organization { string id = 1; string external_id = 2; string name = 3; string display_name = 4; string owner_id = 5; string parent_id = 6; repeated string tags = 7; bool enabled = 8; }
message Group { string id = 1; string external_id = 2; string org_id = 3; string parent_id = 4; string name = 5; string display_name = 6; string type = 7; string path = 8; repeated string users = 9; }
message Application { string id = 1; string external_id = 2; string org_id = 3; string name = 4; string display_name = 5; string client_id = 6; repeated string redirect_uris = 7; repeated string grant_types = 8; repeated string scopes = 9; repeated string providers = 10; bool enable_password = 11; bool enable_signup = 12; }
message ObjectRef { string type = 1; string id = 2; }
message SubjectRef { string type = 1; string id = 2; string relation = 3; }
message Relationship { ObjectRef resource = 1; string relation = 2; SubjectRef subject = 3; }
message RelationshipFilter { string resource_type = 1; string resource_id = 2; string relation = 3; string subject_type = 4; string subject_id = 5; string subject_relation = 6; }

===== api/iam/v1/iam_authz.pb.go =====
// Code generated by protoc-gen-go-authz. DO NOT EDIT.
// versions:
// - protoc-gen-go-authz v0.4.1
// source: iam/v1/iam.proto

package v1

import (
	context "context"
	accessx "github.com/aisphereio/kernel/accessx"
	v1 "github.com/aisphereio/kernel/api/aisphere/access/v1"
	authz "github.com/aisphereio/kernel/authz"
	contextx "github.com/aisphereio/kernel/contextx"
	requestx "github.com/aisphereio/kernel/requestx"
	grpc "google.golang.org/grpc"
	emptypb "google.golang.org/protobuf/types/known/emptypb"
	strings "strings"
)

var _ = grpc.EmptyCallOption{}

var IAMDirectoryServiceAuthzRules = authz.Rules{
	"/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/GetUser": {
		Service:    "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService",
		Method:     "GetUser",
		FullMethod: "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/GetUser",
		Action:     "read",
		Resource:   "iam:org:{org_id}:user:{user_id}",
		Audience:   "iam-service",
		Mode:       authz.RuleMode("CHECK_ONLY"),
		AuditEvent: "iam.user.get",
		AuditRisk:  "low",
	},
	"/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/ListUsers": {
		Service:    "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService",
		Method:     "ListUsers",
		FullMethod: "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/ListUsers",
		Action:     "list",
		Resource:   "iam:org:{org_id}:user:*",
		Audience:   "iam-service",
		Mode:       authz.RuleMode("CHECK_ONLY"),
		AuditEvent: "iam.user.list",
		AuditRisk:  "medium",
	},
	"/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/GetOrganization": {
		Service:    "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService",
		Method:     "GetOrganization",
		FullMethod: "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/GetOrganization",
		Action:     "read",
		Resource:   "iam:org:{org_id}:organization:{org_id}",
		Audience:   "iam-service",
		Mode:       authz.RuleMode("CHECK_ONLY"),
		AuditEvent: "iam.org.get",
		AuditRisk:  "low",
	},
	"/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/ListGroups": {
		Service:    "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService",
		Method:     "ListGroups",
		FullMethod: "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/ListGroups",
		Action:     "list",
		Resource:   "iam:org:{org_id}:group:*",
		Audience:   "iam-service",
		Mode:       authz.RuleMode("CHECK_ONLY"),
		AuditEvent: "iam.group.list",
		AuditRisk:  "medium",
	},
	"/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/GetGroup": {
		Service:    "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService",
		Method:     "GetGroup",
		FullMethod: "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/GetGroup",
		Action:     "view",
		Resource:   "group:{group_id}",
		Audience:   "iam-service",
		Mode:       authz.RuleMode("SELF_CHECK"),
		AuditEvent: "iam.group.get",
		AuditRisk:  "low",
	},
	"/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/CreateGroup": {
		Service:    "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService",
		Method:     "CreateGroup",
		FullMethod: "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/CreateGroup",
		Action:     "create_groups",
		Resource:   "zone:{org_id}",
		Audience:   "iam-service",

	},
	"/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/UpdateGroup": {

// IAMDirectoryServiceRequestInfoResolver maps generated proto access policy into requestx.Info.
// It should be passed to autowire.WithRequestInfoResolver / WithClientRequestInfoResolver.
func IAMDirectoryServiceRequestInfoResolver(ctx context.Context, operation string, req any) (requestx.Info, bool, error) {
	_ = ctx
	_ = req
	rule, ok := IAMDirectoryServiceAuthzRules[operation]
	if !ok && operation != "" {
		rule, ok = IAMDirectoryServiceAuthzRules[_IAMDirectoryServiceNormalizeOperation(operation)]
	}
	if !ok {
		return requestx.Info{}, false, nil
	}
	info := requestx.Info{
		Service:       rule.Service,
		Method:        rule.Method,
		Operation:     rule.FullMethod,
		Exposure:      v1.Exposure_AUTHORIZED,
		Action:        rule.Action,
		Resource:      rule.Resource,
		TargetService: rule.Audience,
		Labels:        map[string]string{"authz_mode": string(rule.Mode)},
	}
	if rule.AuditEvent != "" {
		info.Labels["audit_event"] = rule.AuditEvent
	}
	if rule.AuditRisk != "" {
		info.Labels["audit_risk"] = rule.AuditRisk
	}
	if rule.Capability != "" {
		info.Labels["capability"] = rule.Capability
	}
	return info.Normalize(), true, nil
}

// IAMDirectoryServiceAccessResolver maps generated proto authz rules into accessx.Check.
// It matches middleware/access.Resolver, so services can pass it directly to autowire.WithAccess.
func IAMDirectoryServiceAccessResolver(ctx context.Context, operation string, req any) (accessx.Check, bool, error) {
	rule, ok := IAMDirectoryServiceAuthzRules[operation]
	if !ok && operation != "" {
		rule, ok = IAMDirectoryServiceAuthzRules[_IAMDirectoryServiceNormalizeOperation(operation)]
	}
	if !ok || rule.Action == "" {
		return accessx.Check{}, false, nil
	}
	resource, err := (authz.RuleResolver{}).ResolveResource(rule, req)
	if err != nil {
		return accessx.Check{}, true, err
	}
	_ = ctx
	check := accessx.Check{
		Permission:  rule.Action,
		Resource:    resource,
		AuditAction: rule.AuditEvent,
		Metadata:    map[string]any{"authz_rule": rule.FullMethod, "authz_mode": string(rule.Mode)},
	}
	if check.AuditAction == "" {
		check.AuditAction = rule.Action
	}
	return check, true, nil
}

func _IAMDirectoryServiceNormalizeOperation(operation string) string {
	switch operation {
	case "GetUser", "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/GetUser":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/GetUser"
	case "ListUsers", "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/ListUsers":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/ListUsers"
	case "GetOrganization", "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/GetOrganization":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/GetOrganization"
	case "ListGroups", "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/ListGroups":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/ListGroups"
	case "GetGroup", "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/GetGroup":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/GetGroup"
	case "CreateGroup", "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/CreateGroup":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/CreateGroup"
	case "UpdateGroup", "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/UpdateGroup":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/UpdateGroup"
	case "DeleteGroup", "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/DeleteGroup":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/DeleteGroup"
	case "AssignUserToGroup", "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/AssignUserToGroup":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/AssignUserToGroup"
	case "RemoveUserFromGroup", "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/RemoveUserFromGroup":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/RemoveUserFromGroup"
	default:
		return operation
	}
}

type IAMDirectoryServiceSecureClient struct {
	raw      IAMDirectoryServiceClient
	guard    authz.Guard
	resolver authz.RuleResolver
}

func NewIAMDirectoryServiceSecureClient(raw IAMDirectoryServiceClient, guard authz.Guard) *IAMDirectoryServiceSecureClient {
	return &IAMDirectoryServiceSecureClient{raw: raw, guard: guard, resolver: authz.RuleResolver{}}
}

var _ IAMDirectoryServiceClient = (*IAMDirectoryServiceSecureClient)(nil)

func (c *IAMDirectoryServiceSecureClient) GetUser(ctx context.Context, in *GetUserRequest, opts ...grpc.CallOption) (*User, error) {
	if c != nil && c.guard != nil {
		rule := IAMDirectoryServiceAuthzRules["/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/GetUser"]
		resource, err := c.resolver.ResolveResource(rule, in)
		if err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		subject := _IAMDirectoryServiceAuthzSubjectFromContext(ctx)
		switch rule.Mode {
		case authz.RuleModeScopedToken:
			token, decision, err := c.guard.RequireScopedToken(ctx, authz.ScopedTokenRequest{Subject: subject, Action: rule.Action, Resource: resource, Audience: rule.Audience, Rule: rule, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
			if token != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithScopedToken(ctx, token)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeCheckOnly:
			decision, err := c.guard.Require(ctx, authz.CheckRequest{Subject: subject, Resource: resource, Permission: rule.Action, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeSelfCheck:
		// SELF_CHECK means the target resource service performs the final check.
		case authz.RuleModeUnspecified:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("authz rule mode must not be UNSPECIFIED")
		default:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("unsupported authz rule mode: " + string(rule.Mode))
		}
	}
	return c.raw.GetUser(ctx, in, opts...)
}

func (c *IAMDirectoryServiceSecureClient) ListUsers(ctx context.Context, in *ListUsersRequest, opts ...grpc.CallOption) (*ListUsersReply, error) {
	if c != nil && c.guard != nil {
		rule := IAMDirectoryServiceAuthzRules["/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/ListUsers"]
		resource, err := c.resolver.ResolveResource(rule, in)
		if err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		subject := _IAMDirectoryServiceAuthzSubjectFromContext(ctx)
		switch rule.Mode {
		case authz.RuleModeScopedToken:
			token, decision, err := c.guard.RequireScopedToken(ctx, authz.ScopedTokenRequest{Subject: subject, Action: rule.Action, Resource: resource, Audience: rule.Audience, Rule: rule, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
			if token != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithScopedToken(ctx, token)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeCheckOnly:
			decision, err := c.guard.Require(ctx, authz.CheckRequest{Subject: subject, Resource: resource, Permission: rule.Action, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeSelfCheck:
		// SELF_CHECK means the target resource service performs the final check.
		case authz.RuleModeUnspecified:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("authz rule mode must not be UNSPECIFIED")
		default:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("unsupported authz rule mode: " + string(rule.Mode))
		}
	}
	return c.raw.ListUsers(ctx, in, opts...)
}

		}

}

func (c *IAMDirectoryServiceSecureClient) DeleteGroup(ctx context.Context, in *DeleteGroupRequest, opts ...grpc.CallOption) (*emptypb.Empty, error) {
	if c != nil && c.guard != nil {
		rule := IAMDirectoryServiceAuthzRules["/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/DeleteGroup"]
		resource, err := c.resolver.ResolveResource(rule, in)
		if err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		subject := _IAMDirectoryServiceAuthzSubjectFromContext(ctx)
		switch rule.Mode {
		case authz.RuleModeScopedToken:
			token, decision, err := c.guard.RequireScopedToken(ctx, authz.ScopedTokenRequest{Subject: subject, Action: rule.Action, Resource: resource, Audience: rule.Audience, Rule: rule, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
			if token != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithScopedToken(ctx, token)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeCheckOnly:
			decision, err := c.guard.Require(ctx, authz.CheckRequest{Subject: subject, Resource: resource, Permission: rule.Action, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeSelfCheck:
		// SELF_CHECK means the target resource service performs the final check.
		case authz.RuleModeUnspecified:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("authz rule mode must not be UNSPECIFIED")
		default:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("unsupported authz rule mode: " + string(rule.Mode))
		}
	}
	return c.raw.DeleteGroup(ctx, in, opts...)
}

func (c *IAMDirectoryServiceSecureClient) AssignUserToGroup(ctx context.Context, in *AssignUserToGroupRequest, opts ...grpc.CallOption) (*emptypb.Empty, error) {
	if c != nil && c.guard != nil {
		rule := IAMDirectoryServiceAuthzRules["/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/AssignUserToGroup"]
		resource, err := c.resolver.ResolveResource(rule, in)
		if err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		subject := _IAMDirectoryServiceAuthzSubjectFromContext(ctx)
		switch rule.Mode {
		case authz.RuleModeScopedToken:
			token, decision, err := c.guard.RequireScopedToken(ctx, authz.ScopedTokenRequest{Subject: subject, Action: rule.Action, Resource: resource, Audience: rule.Audience, Rule: rule, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
			if token != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithScopedToken(ctx, token)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeCheckOnly:
			decision, err := c.guard.Require(ctx, authz.CheckRequest{Subject: subject, Resource: resource, Permission: rule.Action, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeSelfCheck:
		// SELF_CHECK means the target resource service performs the final check.
		case authz.RuleModeUnspecified:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("authz rule mode must not be UNSPECIFIED")
		default:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("unsupported authz rule mode: " + string(rule.Mode))
		}
	}
	return c.raw.AssignUserToGroup(ctx, in, opts...)
}

func (c *IAMDirectoryServiceSecureClient) RemoveUserFromGroup(ctx context.Context, in *RemoveUserFromGroupRequest, opts ...grpc.CallOption) (*emptypb.Empty, error) {
	if c != nil && c.guard != nil {
		rule := IAMDirectoryServiceAuthzRules["/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryService/RemoveUserFromGroup"]
		resource, err := c.resolver.ResolveResource(rule, in)
		if err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		subject := _IAMDirectoryServiceAuthzSubjectFromContext(ctx)
		switch rule.Mode {
		case authz.RuleModeScopedToken:
			token, decision, err := c.guard.RequireScopedToken(ctx, authz.ScopedTokenRequest{Subject: subject, Action: rule.Action, Resource: resource, Audience: rule.Audience, Rule: rule, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
			if token != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithScopedToken(ctx, token)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeCheckOnly:
			decision, err := c.guard.Require(ctx, authz.CheckRequest{Subject: subject, Resource: resource, Permission: rule.Action, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeSelfCheck:
		// SELF_CHECK means the target resource service performs the final check.
		case authz.RuleModeUnspecified:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("authz rule mode must not be UNSPECIFIED")
		default:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("unsupported authz rule mode: " + string(rule.Mode))
		}
	}
	return c.raw.RemoveUserFromGroup(ctx, in, opts...)
}

func _IAMDirectoryServiceAuthzSubjectFromContext(ctx context.Context) authz.SubjectRef {
	p := contextx.PrincipalFromContext(ctx)
	if p == nil {
		return authz.SubjectRef{}
	}
	typ := authz.SubjectTypeUser
	if strings.HasPrefix(p.SubjectID, "svc:") {
		typ = authz.SubjectTypeService
	}
	return authz.SubjectRef{Type: typ, ID: p.SubjectID}
}

var IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceAuthzRules = authz.Rules{
	"/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/RetryDirectoryProjection": {
		Service:    "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService",
		Method:     "RetryDirectoryProjection",
		FullMethod: "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/RetryDirectoryProjection",
		Action:     "repair_relationships",
		Resource:   "iam_authz:global",
		Audience:   "iam-service",
		Mode:       authz.RuleMode("SELF_CHECK"),
		AuditEvent: "iam.directory_projection.retry",
		AuditRisk:  "high",
	},
	"/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/ReconcileDirectoryProjection": {
		Service:    "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService",
		Method:     "ReconcileDirectoryProjection",
		FullMethod: "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/ReconcileDirectoryProjection",
		Action:     "repair_relationships",
		Resource:   "iam_authz:global",
		Audience:   "iam-service",
		Mode:       authz.RuleMode("SELF_CHECK"),
		AuditEvent: "iam.directory_projection.reconcile",
		AuditRisk:  "critical",
	},
	"/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/CheckDirectoryProjectionDrift": {
		Service:    "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService",
		Method:     "CheckDirectoryProjectionDrift",
		FullMethod: "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/CheckDirectoryProjectionDrift",
		Action:     "view_relationships",
		Resource:   "iam_authz:global",
		Audience:   "iam-service",
		Mode:       authz.RuleMode("SELF_CHECK"),
		AuditEvent: "iam.directory_projection.drift",
		AuditRisk:  "medium",
	},
}

const IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceAuthzManifestJSON = `{
  "methods": [
    {
      "service": "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService",
      "method": "RetryDirectoryProjection",
      "full_method": "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/RetryDirectoryProjection",
      "action": "repair_relationships",
      "resource": "iam_authz:global",
      "audience": "iam-service",
      "mode": "SELF_CHECK",
      "audit_event": "iam.directory_projection.retry",
      "audit_risk": "high"
    },
    {
      "service": "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService",
      "method": "ReconcileDirectoryProjection",
      "full_method": "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/ReconcileDirectoryProjection",

      "resource": "iam_authz:global",
      "audience": "iam-service",

      "resource": "iam_authz:global",
      "audience": "iam-service",
      "mode": "SELF_CHECK",
      "audit_event": "iam.directory_projection.drift",
      "audit_risk": "medium"
    }
  ],
  "service": "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService"
}`

// IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceRequestInfoResolver maps generated proto access policy into requestx.Info.
// It should be passed to autowire.WithRequestInfoResolver / WithClientRequestInfoResolver.
func IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceRequestInfoResolver(ctx context.Context, operation string, req any) (requestx.Info, bool, error) {
	_ = ctx
	_ = req
	rule, ok := IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceAuthzRules[operation]
	if !ok && operation != "" {
		rule, ok = IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceAuthzRules[_IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceNormalizeOperation(operation)]
	}
	if !ok {
		return requestx.Info{}, false, nil
	}
	info := requestx.Info{
		Service:       rule.Service,
		Method:        rule.Method,
		Operation:     rule.FullMethod,
		Exposure:      v1.Exposure_AUTHORIZED,
		Action:        rule.Action,
		Resource:      rule.Resource,
		TargetService: rule.Audience,
		Labels:        map[string]string{"authz_mode": string(rule.Mode)},
	}
	if rule.AuditEvent != "" {
		info.Labels["audit_event"] = rule.AuditEvent
	}
	if rule.AuditRisk != "" {
		info.Labels["audit_risk"] = rule.AuditRisk
	}
	if rule.Capability != "" {
		info.Labels["capability"] = rule.Capability
	}
	return info.Normalize(), true, nil
}

// IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceAccessResolver maps generated proto authz rules into accessx.Check.
// It matches middleware/access.Resolver, so services can pass it directly to autowire.WithAccess.
func IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceAccessResolver(ctx context.Context, operation string, req any) (accessx.Check, bool, error) {
	rule, ok := IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceAuthzRules[operation]
	if !ok && operation != "" {
		rule, ok = IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceAuthzRules[_IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceNormalizeOperation(operation)]
	}
	if !ok || rule.Action == "" {
		return accessx.Check{}, false, nil
	}
	resource, err := (authz.RuleResolver{}).ResolveResource(rule, req)
	if err != nil {
		return accessx.Check{}, true, err
	}
	_ = ctx
	check := accessx.Check{
		Permission:  rule.Action,
		Resource:    resource,
		AuditAction: rule.AuditEvent,
		Metadata:    map[string]any{"authz_rule": rule.FullMethod, "authz_mode": string(rule.Mode)},
	}
	if check.AuditAction == "" {
		check.AuditAction = rule.Action
	}
	return check, true, nil
}

func _IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceNormalizeOperation(operation string) string {
	switch operation {
	case "RetryDirectoryProjection", "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/RetryDirectoryProjection":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/RetryDirectoryProjection"
	case "ReconcileDirectoryProjection", "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/ReconcileDirectoryProjection":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/ReconcileDirectoryProjection"
	case "CheckDirectoryProjectionDrift", "iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/CheckDirectoryProjectionDrift":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/CheckDirectoryProjectionDrift"
	default:
		return operation
	}
}

type IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceSecureClient struct {
	raw      IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceClient
	guard    authz.Guard
	resolver authz.RuleResolver
}

func NewIAMDirectoryProjectionServiceSecureClient(raw IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceClient, guard authz.Guard) *IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceSecureClient {
	return &IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceSecureClient{raw: raw, guard: guard, resolver: authz.RuleResolver{}}
}

var _ IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceClient = (*IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceSecureClient)(nil)

func (c *IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceSecureClient) RetryDirectoryProjection(ctx context.Context, in *RetryDirectoryProjectionRequest, opts ...grpc.CallOption) (*RetryDirectoryProjectionReply, error) {
	if c != nil && c.guard != nil {
		rule := IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceAuthzRules["/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/RetryDirectoryProjection"]
		resource, err := c.resolver.ResolveResource(rule, in)
		if err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		subject := _IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceAuthzSubjectFromContext(ctx)
		switch rule.Mode {
		case authz.RuleModeScopedToken:
			token, decision, err := c.guard.RequireScopedToken(ctx, authz.ScopedTokenRequest{Subject: subject, Action: rule.Action, Resource: resource, Audience: rule.Audience, Rule: rule, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
			if token != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithScopedToken(ctx, token)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeCheckOnly:
			decision, err := c.guard.Require(ctx, authz.CheckRequest{Subject: subject, Resource: resource, Permission: rule.Action, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeSelfCheck:
		// SELF_CHECK means the target resource service performs the final check.
		case authz.RuleModeUnspecified:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("authz rule mode must not be UNSPECIFIED")
		default:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("unsupported authz rule mode: " + string(rule.Mode))
		}
	}
	return c.raw.RetryDirectoryProjection(ctx, in, opts...)
}

	if c != nil && c.guard != nil {
		rule := IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceAuthzRules["/iam.v1.IAMDirectoryProjectionService/ReconcileDirectoryProjection"]
		resource, err := c.resolver.ResolveResource(rule, in)
		if err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		subject := _IAMDirectoryProjectionServiceAuthzSubjectFromContext(ctx)
		switch rule.Mode {
		case authz.RuleModeScopedToken:
			token, decision, err := c.guard.RequireScopedToken(ctx, authz.ScopedTokenRequest{Subject: subject, Action: rule.Action, Resource: resource, Audience: rule.Audience, Rule: rule, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}

				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
			if token != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithScopedToken(ctx, token)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeCheckOnly:
			decision, err := c.guard.Require(ctx, authz.CheckRequest{Subject: subject, Resource: resource, Permission: rule.Action, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err

			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}

		// SELF_CHECK means the target resource service performs the final check.

			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("authz rule mode must not be UNSPECIFIED")
		default:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("unsupported authz rule mode: " + string(rule.Mode))
		}

			}

			}

		// SELF_CHECK means the target resource service performs the final check.
		case authz.RuleModeUnspecified:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("authz rule mode must not be UNSPECIFIED")
		default:

		}
	}
	return c.raw.CheckDirectoryProjectionDrift(ctx, in, opts...)
}

	if p == nil {
		return authz.SubjectRef{}
	}
	typ := authz.SubjectTypeUser
	if strings.HasPrefix(p.SubjectID, "svc:") {
		typ = authz.SubjectTypeService
	}
	return authz.SubjectRef{Type: typ, ID: p.SubjectID}

// IAMPermissionServiceRequestInfoResolver maps generated proto access policy into requestx.Info.
// It should be passed to autowire.WithRequestInfoResolver / WithClientRequestInfoResolver.
func IAMPermissionServiceRequestInfoResolver(ctx context.Context, operation string, req any) (requestx.Info, bool, error) {
	_ = ctx
	_ = req
	rule, ok := IAMPermissionServiceAuthzRules[operation]
	if !ok && operation != "" {
		rule, ok = IAMPermissionServiceAuthzRules[_IAMPermissionServiceNormalizeOperation(operation)]
	}
	if !ok {
		return requestx.Info{}, false, nil
	}
	info := requestx.Info{
		Service:       rule.Service,
		Method:        rule.Method,
		Operation:     rule.FullMethod,
		Exposure:      v1.Exposure_AUTHORIZED,
		Action:        rule.Action,
		Resource:      rule.Resource,
		TargetService: rule.Audience,
		Labels:        map[string]string{"authz_mode": string(rule.Mode)},
	}
	if rule.AuditEvent != "" {
		info.Labels["audit_event"] = rule.AuditEvent
	}
	if rule.AuditRisk != "" {
		info.Labels["audit_risk"] = rule.AuditRisk
	}
	if rule.Capability != "" {
		info.Labels["capability"] = rule.Capability
	}
	return info.Normalize(), true, nil
}

// IAMPermissionServiceAccessResolver maps generated proto authz rules into accessx.Check.
// It matches middleware/access.Resolver, so services can pass it directly to autowire.WithAccess.
func IAMPermissionServiceAccessResolver(ctx context.Context, operation string, req any) (accessx.Check, bool, error) {
	rule, ok := IAMPermissionServiceAuthzRules[operation]
	if !ok && operation != "" {
		rule, ok = IAMPermissionServiceAuthzRules[_IAMPermissionServiceNormalizeOperation(operation)]
	}
	if !ok || rule.Action == "" {
		return accessx.Check{}, false, nil
	}
	resource, err := (authz.RuleResolver{}).ResolveResource(rule, req)
	if err != nil {
		return accessx.Check{}, true, err
	}
	_ = ctx
	check := accessx.Check{
		Permission:  rule.Action,
		Resource:    resource,
		AuditAction: rule.AuditEvent,
		Metadata:    map[string]any{"authz_rule": rule.FullMethod, "authz_mode": string(rule.Mode)},
	}
	if check.AuditAction == "" {
		check.AuditAction = rule.Action
	}
	return check, true, nil
}

func _IAMPermissionServiceNormalizeOperation(operation string) string {
	switch operation {
	case "WriteRelationship", "iam.v1.IAMPermissionService/WriteRelationship":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMPermissionService/WriteRelationship"
	case "DeleteRelationship", "iam.v1.IAMPermissionService/DeleteRelationship":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMPermissionService/DeleteRelationship"
	default:
		return operation
	}
}

func (c *IAMPermissionServiceSecureClient) WriteRelationship(ctx context.Context, in *WriteRelationshipRequest, opts ...grpc.CallOption) (*WriteRelationshipReply, error) {
	if c != nil && c.guard != nil {
		rule := IAMPermissionServiceAuthzRules["/iam.v1.IAMPermissionService/WriteRelationship"]
		resource, err := c.resolver.ResolveResource(rule, in)
		if err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		subject := _IAMPermissionServiceAuthzSubjectFromContext(ctx)
		switch rule.Mode {
		case authz.RuleModeScopedToken:
			token, decision, err := c.guard.RequireScopedToken(ctx, authz.ScopedTokenRequest{Subject: subject, Action: rule.Action, Resource: resource, Audience: rule.Audience, Rule: rule, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
			if token != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithScopedToken(ctx, token)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeCheckOnly:
			decision, err := c.guard.Require(ctx, authz.CheckRequest{Subject: subject, Resource: resource, Permission: rule.Action, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeSelfCheck:
		// SELF_CHECK means the target resource service performs the final check.
		case authz.RuleModeUnspecified:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("authz rule mode must not be UNSPECIFIED")
		default:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("unsupported authz rule mode: " + string(rule.Mode))
		}
	}
	return c.raw.WriteRelationship(ctx, in, opts...)
}

func (c *IAMPermissionServiceSecureClient) DeleteRelationship(ctx context.Context, in *DeleteRelationshipRequest, opts ...grpc.CallOption) (*DeleteRelationshipReply, error) {
	if c != nil && c.guard != nil {
		rule := IAMPermissionServiceAuthzRules["/iam.v1.IAMPermissionService/DeleteRelationship"]
		resource, err := c.resolver.ResolveResource(rule, in)
		if err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		subject := _IAMPermissionServiceAuthzSubjectFromContext(ctx)
		switch rule.Mode {
		case authz.RuleModeScopedToken:
			token, decision, err := c.guard.RequireScopedToken(ctx, authz.ScopedTokenRequest{Subject: subject, Action: rule.Action, Resource: resource, Audience: rule.Audience, Rule: rule, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
			if token != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithScopedToken(ctx, token)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeCheckOnly:
			decision, err := c.guard.Require(ctx, authz.CheckRequest{Subject: subject, Resource: resource, Permission: rule.Action, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeSelfCheck:
		// SELF_CHECK means the target resource service performs the final check.
		case authz.RuleModeUnspecified:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("authz rule mode must not be UNSPECIFIED")
		default:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("unsupported authz rule mode: " + string(rule.Mode))
		}
	}
	return c.raw.DeleteRelationship(ctx, in, opts...)
}

func (c *IAMPermissionServiceSecureClient) LookupResources(ctx context.Context, in *LookupResourcesRequest, opts ...grpc.CallOption) (*LookupResourcesReply, error) {
	return c.raw.LookupResources(ctx, in, opts...)
}

func (c *IAMPermissionServiceSecureClient) LookupSubjects(ctx context.Context, in *LookupSubjectsRequest, opts ...grpc.CallOption) (*LookupSubjectsReply, error) {
	return c.raw.LookupSubjects(ctx, in, opts...)
}

func _IAMPermissionServiceAuthzSubjectFromContext(ctx context.Context) authz.SubjectRef {
	p := contextx.PrincipalFromContext(ctx)
	if p == nil {
		return authz.SubjectRef{}
	}
	typ := authz.SubjectTypeUser
	if strings.HasPrefix(p.SubjectID, "svc:") {
		typ = authz.SubjectTypeService
	}
	return authz.SubjectRef{Type: typ, ID: p.SubjectID}
}

// IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceRequestInfoResolver maps generated proto access policy into requestx.Info.
// It should be passed to autowire.WithRequestInfoResolver / WithClientRequestInfoResolver.
func IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceRequestInfoResolver(ctx context.Context, operation string, req any) (requestx.Info, bool, error) {
	_ = ctx
	_ = req
	rule, ok := IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceAuthzRules[operation]
	if !ok && operation != "" {
		rule, ok = IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceAuthzRules[_IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceNormalizeOperation(operation)]
	}
	if !ok {
		return requestx.Info{}, false, nil
	}
	info := requestx.Info{
		Service:       rule.Service,
		Method:        rule.Method,
		Operation:     rule.FullMethod,
		Exposure:      v1.Exposure_AUTHORIZED,
		Action:        rule.Action,
		Resource:      rule.Resource,
		TargetService: rule.Audience,
		Labels:        map[string]string{"authz_mode": string(rule.Mode)},
	}
	if rule.AuditEvent != "" {
		info.Labels["audit_event"] = rule.AuditEvent
	}
	if rule.AuditRisk != "" {
		info.Labels["audit_risk"] = rule.AuditRisk
	}
	if rule.Capability != "" {
		info.Labels["capability"] = rule.Capability
	}
	return info.Normalize(), true, nil
}

// IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceAccessResolver maps generated proto authz rules into accessx.Check.
// It matches middleware/access.Resolver, so services can pass it directly to autowire.WithAccess.
func IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceAccessResolver(ctx context.Context, operation string, req any) (accessx.Check, bool, error) {
	rule, ok := IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceAuthzRules[operation]
	if !ok && operation != "" {
		rule, ok = IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceAuthzRules[_IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceNormalizeOperation(operation)]
	}
	if !ok || rule.Action == "" {
		return accessx.Check{}, false, nil
	}
	resource, err := (authz.RuleResolver{}).ResolveResource(rule, req)
	if err != nil {
		return accessx.Check{}, true, err
	}
	_ = ctx
	check := accessx.Check{
		Permission:  rule.Action,
		Resource:    resource,
		AuditAction: rule.AuditEvent,
		Metadata:    map[string]any{"authz_rule": rule.FullMethod, "authz_mode": string(rule.Mode)},
	}
	if check.AuditAction == "" {
		check.AuditAction = rule.Action
	}
	return check, true, nil
}

func _IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceNormalizeOperation(operation string) string {
	switch operation {
	case "GetAuthorizationSchema", "iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/GetAuthorizationSchema":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/GetAuthorizationSchema"
	case "ValidateAuthorizationSchema", "iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/ValidateAuthorizationSchema":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/ValidateAuthorizationSchema"
	case "PublishAuthorizationSchema", "iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/PublishAuthorizationSchema":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/PublishAuthorizationSchema"
	case "ListRelationships", "iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/ListRelationships":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/ListRelationships"
	case "WriteRelationships", "iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/WriteRelationships":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/WriteRelationships"
	case "DeleteRelationships", "iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/DeleteRelationships":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/DeleteRelationships"
	case "CheckAuthorization", "iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/CheckAuthorization":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/CheckAuthorization"
	case "ExplainAuthorization", "iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/ExplainAuthorization":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/ExplainAuthorization"
	case "GetEffectivePermissions", "iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/GetEffectivePermissions":
		return "/iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/GetEffectivePermissions"
	default:
		return operation
	}
}

type IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceSecureClient struct {
	raw      IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceClient
	guard    authz.Guard
	resolver authz.RuleResolver
}

func NewIAMAuthorizationAdminServiceSecureClient(raw IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceClient, guard authz.Guard) *IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceSecureClient {
	return &IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceSecureClient{raw: raw, guard: guard, resolver: authz.RuleResolver{}}
}

var _ IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceClient = (*IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceSecureClient)(nil)

func (c *IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceSecureClient) GetAuthorizationSchema(ctx context.Context, in *GetAuthorizationSchemaRequest, opts ...grpc.CallOption) (*AuthorizationSchema, error) {
	if c != nil && c.guard != nil {
		rule := IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceAuthzRules["/iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/GetAuthorizationSchema"]
		resource, err := c.resolver.ResolveResource(rule, in)
		if err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		subject := _IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceAuthzSubjectFromContext(ctx)
		switch rule.Mode {
		case authz.RuleModeScopedToken:
			token, decision, err := c.guard.RequireScopedToken(ctx, authz.ScopedTokenRequest{Subject: subject, Action: rule.Action, Resource: resource, Audience: rule.Audience, Rule: rule, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
			if token != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithScopedToken(ctx, token)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeCheckOnly:
			decision, err := c.guard.Require(ctx, authz.CheckRequest{Subject: subject, Resource: resource, Permission: rule.Action, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeSelfCheck:
		// SELF_CHECK means the target resource service performs the final check.
		case authz.RuleModeUnspecified:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("authz rule mode must not be UNSPECIFIED")
		default:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("unsupported authz rule mode: " + string(rule.Mode))
		}
	}
	return c.raw.GetAuthorizationSchema(ctx, in, opts...)
}

func (c *IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceSecureClient) ValidateAuthorizationSchema(ctx context.Context, in *ValidateAuthorizationSchemaRequest, opts ...grpc.CallOption) (*ValidateAuthorizationSchemaReply, error) {
	if c != nil && c.guard != nil {
		rule := IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceAuthzRules["/iam.v1.IAMAuthorizationAdminService/ValidateAuthorizationSchema"]
		resource, err := c.resolver.ResolveResource(rule, in)
		if err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		subject := _IAMAuthorizationAdminServiceAuthzSubjectFromContext(ctx)
		switch rule.Mode {
		case authz.RuleModeScopedToken:
			token, decision, err := c.guard.RequireScopedToken(ctx, authz.ScopedTokenRequest{Subject: subject, Action: rule.Action, Resource: resource, Audience: rule.Audience, Rule: rule, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
			if token != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithScopedToken(ctx, token)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeCheckOnly:
			decision, err := c.guard.Require(ctx, authz.CheckRequest{Subject: subject, Resource: resource, Permission: rule.Action, TenantID: contextx.TenantFromContext(ctx)})
			if err != nil {
				return nil, err
			}
			if decision.ConsistencyToken != "" {
				ctx = contextx.WithAuthzDecisionID(ctx, decision.ConsistencyToken)
			}
		case authz.RuleModeSelfCheck:
		// SELF_CHECK means the target resource service performs the final check.
		case authz.RuleModeUnspecified:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("authz rule mode must not be UNSPECIFIED")
		default:
			return nil, authz.ErrInvalidRequest("unsupported authz rule mode: " + string(rule.Mode))
		}
	}
	return c.raw.ValidateAuthorizationSchema(ctx, in, opts...)
}
